div.p:
dcache HIT — dentry found in kernel hash table → ~500 ns (no disk)
dcache MISS — kernel reads inode block from disk → ~100 µs (SSD) / ~10 ms (HDD)
S_ISLNK — component is a symlink → readlink() called, target substituted, walk restarts from target
".." component — libc pops one level from the resolved-path stack; no extra lstat() needed
Depth guard — ELOOP returned if symlink chain exceeds MAXSYMLINKS (40 on Linux)
